steps.title: Identify the bounds from the problem
steps.content: The airplane's cruising speed varied between 150 mph and 170 mph. "Varied between" means the speed was at least 150 and at most 170, inclusive.

steps.title: Eliminate wrong choices and confirm
steps.content:
• Choice A — '$s\le20$': This caps speed at 20 mph — far below any real cruising speed. ✗
  • Choice B — '$s\le150$': Only an upper bound; allows speeds below 150 and excludes speeds up to 170. ✗
  • Choice C — '$s\le170$': Only an upper bound; allows any speed below 170 but ignores the lower bound of 150. ✗
  • Choice D — '$150\le s\le170$': Exactly captures both bounds — speed is between 150 and 170 inclusive. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
